'''Mirani''' was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Aramand system/Legends|Aramand system]], located within the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] that was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by nineteen [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. The [[Aramandi]] [[Species/Legends|species]] colonized some of them.
